eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Kendall, TX; at 8:31 AM on JUL 15, 2026 Effective until 9:01 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: SHELTER IN PLACE RANGER CREEK ROAD RESIDENCE. Ranger Creek is over the bridge at IH10. B. Constantine Kendall OEM Shelter in place
